texto: Toothless? Hey, it’s me, bud. It’s me. It’s me, I’m right here, bud. Come back to me. It wasn’t your fault, bud. They… made you do it. You’d never hurt him. You’d never hurt me! Please, you.. are my best friend, bud… My best friend.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Hiccup Horrendous Haddock que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “Toothless? Hey, it’s me, bud. It’s me. It’s me, I’m right here, bud. Come back to me. It wasn’t y…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre amizade, trust, never, com foco em termino e trust.
